resources.string: Too many attempts. Wait a minute or two and try again.
Name must be longer than 2 characters
The birthday you entered is invalid
This nickname is invalid. Try a different one.
This photo is invalid. Try a different one.
该账号已在其他设备登录
Make sure to activate your account within 24 hours
请安装最新版游戏中心
需要以下权限才能继续
请更新到最新版本，否则无法正常使用
请在设置中找到-%s，进入安装未知应用页面，打开允许来自此来源的应用选项
是否开启系统设置权限
为提供完整功能，需要联网及调用以下权限：读写设备上的照片及文件、拍摄照片和录制视频。您可以随时前往权限管理调整所有权限的授权情况。
" 请您阅读并同意我们的《用户协议》 《隐私政策》与《儿童信息保护规则》。 "
“小游戏”为您提供无需下载、即点即玩的游戏体验。
查看完整版本《用户协议》《隐私政策》
"三方SDK授权部分： 增加快手SDK用于播放短视频，因此需要提供给三方SDK您的MAC地址信息"
我们升级了隐私协议，主要内容如下
用于存储一些数据信息
"Sent logs successfully. ID:%s Send this code to the supervisor."
This email address is already associated with another Mi Account.
The email address you entered is invalid.
This phone number is already associated with another Mi Account.
Current mode: Repeat all. Toggle repeat mode.
Current mode: Repeat none. Toggle repeat mode.
Current mode: Repeat one. Toggle repeat mode.
Logs are used only for diagnostics.
Too many verification codes have been sent to this number. Wait 24 hours and try again.
当前非WIFI网络，请注意流量消耗
"We'll use this email to verify your account"
Android SQLite API based on SQLCipher
是否允许小游戏访问您的系统小米账号?
请勾选相关服务协议后重试
您的账号暂未绑定密码,请使用手机+验证码登录
网络异常，请确保网络稳定后，再试
请输入正确短信验证码
验证码获取失败,请重试
验证码发送失败:请检查本机时间是否正确/是否使用代理/是否被监听等
微信绑定已超过频次限制,请使用其他方式登录
小米账号/手机号码/邮箱
未安装微信客户端，请先下载安装
小米账号登陆失败，已为您自动切换至账号登陆

string.name: login_mi_user_agreement
string.Data: 已阅读并同意系统账号的《用户协议》 和 《隐私政策》，小游戏账号的 《用户协议》 和 《隐私政策》

resources.string: 网络异常，请检查网络设置后再试。
验证码已发送，请注意查收

string.name: login_user_agreement
string.Data: 已阅读并同意《用户协议》 和 《隐私政策》

resources.string: 没有收到验证码？重新获取（%ds）

string.name: login_verify_code_failed
string.Data: 没有收到验证码？重新获取

resources.string: Switch to clock mode for the time input.
Switch to text input mode for the time input.
注销小游戏账号后，小游戏账号及相关数据将无法再找回，您是否确认要注销小游戏账号？
注销小游戏账号后，您将无法使用该账号继续登录小游戏或找回该账号下的任何小游戏数据。请谨慎操作。
默认头像暂无数据，请稍后重试
真实头像昵称更快结识游戏同好
用于上传/修改头像，发布多媒体文件
关闭个性化推荐后，我们将无法为您推荐更符合您喜好的游戏。
用于获取设备识别码，用于保障账号安全
撤销隐私授权并清除本机数据
用于上传/修改头像，发布多媒体文件
需要手机的存储权限才能继续
本功能需要相机权限，用于上传/修改头像，发布多媒体文件
本功能需要读取手机上的储存权限，用于修改头像，发布保存媒体文件等用途
Tap to switch to selecting a day
Tap to switch to selecting a year
A network error occurred. Check your network settings and try again.
"Couldn't connect to the network. Try again."
The email address you entered is invalid
The text you entered is too long
"You haven't set the password yet. Sign in with SMS."
Too many verification codes have been sent to this number. Try again later.
Agree to our User Agreement first
The username you entered is invalid
"We'll create an account automatically if you're using your phone number for the first time."
Check the URL and try again, or copy the URL and open it in your browser.
Password must be 8-16 characters long and combine at least two of the following: digits, letters, and special symbols (e.g. 123abc@#, or 123abc, or abc@#).
Too many accounts have been associated with this number. Try a different one.
You need to sign in again
Too many verification codes have been sent to this number. Wait 24 hours and try again.
Add your phone number to protect your account.
"The service isn't available. Make sure the app is installed and not blocked."
Check your network settings and try again
Your WhatsApp verification code will be sent to your recovery phone (<font color=#1F93FF>%s</font>).
The code you entered is incorrect
The format of the phone number you entered is invalid
The code you entered is incorrect
The code you entered is incorrect

"We shall protect your personal information in accordance with the relevant laws and regulations. This app needs the following permissions to work normally:

Using camera (for setting your profile photo)

If you don't agree to grant such permissions, you won't be able to use some features of this app; however, its basic functionality will still be available to you. You can always restrict permissions or revoke your authorization in the Settings."
A network error occurred. Check your network settings and try again.
A system error occurred. Go back and try again.

Allow access to Gallery:
For setting profile photos
"You've requested too many verification emails. Make sure that the verification email isn't in your inbox's Spam folder."
"Can't be the same as current password"
Session expired. Sign in again to reconnect this account.
Too many attempts. Try other ways to sign in.
"%s falsify area, Represents the height[%.1fdp] of drag at run time, It does not show anything."
The content view in SmartRefreshLayout is empty. Do you forget to add it in xml layout file?
System is busy. Wait a minute or two and try again.
Fifth day of Chinese New Year
Fourth day of Chinese New Year
Second day of Chinese New Year
Seventh day of Chinese New Year
Sixth day of Chinese New Year
Third day of Chinese New Year
You need to verify your identity before you update the recovery email.
请更新到最新版本，否则无法正常使用

string.name: user_agreement_hint_3rd_app
string.Data: "I've read and agreed to User Agreement and Privacy Policy and Mi Account's User Agreement and Privacy Policy."

string.name: user_agreement_hint_3rd_app_mobile
string.Data: "I've read and agreed to User Agreement and Privacy Policy, Mi Account's User Agreement and Privacy Policy, as well as Terms and conditions of China Mobile verification services."

string.name: user_agreement_hint_3rd_app_with_telecom
string.Data: "I've read and agreed to User Agreement and Privacy Policy, Mi Account's User Agreement and Privacy Policy, as well as Terms and conditions of eSurfing account verification services."

string.name: user_agreement_hint_3rd_app_with_unicom
string.Data: "I've read and agreed to User Agreement and Privacy Policy, Mi Account's User Agreement and Privacy Policy, as well as Terms and conditions of China Unicom verification services."

string.name: user_agreement_hint_default
string.Data: "I've read and agreed to Mi Account's User Agreement and Privacy Policy."

string.name: user_agreement_hint_default_1
string.Data: Read and agreed to the User Agreement and Privacy Policy.

string.name: user_agreement_hint_default_extra
string.Data: "I've read and agreed to the User Agreement and Privacy Policy. The first login will automatically create a Xiaomi account"

resources.string: "We'll create an account automatically if you're using your phone number for the first time."

string.name: user_agreement_hint_with_mobile
string.Data: "I've read and agreed to Mi Account's User Agreement and Privacy Policy, as well as Terms and conditions of China Mobile verification services."

string.name: user_agreement_hint_with_telecom
string.Data: "I've read and agreed to Mi Account's User Agreement and Privacy Policy, as well as Terms and conditions of eSurfing account verification services."

string.name: user_agreement_hint_with_unicom
string.Data: "I've read and agreed to Mi Account's User Agreement and Privacy Policy, as well as Terms and conditions of China Unicom verification services."

resources.string: 用于上传图片，发布多媒体文件
需要手机的存储权限才能继续
本功能需要相机权限，用于上传图片，发布多媒体文件
本功能需要读取手机上的储存权限，用于上传图片，发布保存媒体文件等用途
